series_metadata.series_title: Accounting Records, Budgets, and Financial Materials
series_metadata.series_description: Any materials relating to the Straight A Fund finances or disbursement of grant funds.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 5 years and until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved. Review by State Archives before disposal. ; Electronic: Retain 5 years and until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved. Review by State Archives before disposal., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
